concerts.label: Fado: From Lisbon to New York
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Tim Ries
about_quotes.evidence: I did a lot of work with this fado singer Ana Moura... her producer, the guy who plays guitar for her, Jorge Fernando... I sent it to them so that they could learn it and he goes, 'Well can I put lyrics to this?'
about_quotes.doc_title: Tim Ries interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 19, 2022
